title: AI Podcast: Anthropic's Latest & Lisbon's Electric Vibe #shorts
summary: This Is Tech Year podcast episode hosted by Cyril Imhof discusses Anthropic's latest developments with guest Joao. The episode appears to tie together tech news with cultural context around Lisbon and the Santos festival.
writeup: This Is Tech Year podcast short, hosted by Cyril Imhof with guest Joao, covers Anthropic's latest developments. The episode pairs that tech discussion with cultural context around Lisbon and the Santos festival. The takeaway is a conversation linking recent Anthropic news to the local scene in Lisbon.
